data.title: Fitell Corporation spent $10 million to purchase 46,144 SOL
data.description: Fitell Corporation (FTEL), a Nasdaq-listed company, announced its initial acquisition of 46,144 Solana tokens for approximately $10 million. This is the first strategic acquisition under the company’s previously announced Solana financial plan. The acquisition of Solana tokens follows the initial closing of the company’s $100 million financing arrangement. FTEL plans to use a significant portion of the net proceeds from the initial closing to make additional Solana token purchases. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Nextech3D.ai Announces Two-Track Blockchain Ticketing Roadmap
data.description:
TORONTO, ON, September 24th, 2025 – Nextech3D. ai (CSE: NTAR) (OTCQX: NEXCF) (FSE: 1SS) (the “Company” or “Nextech3D. ai”), an AI-powered event management company, today announced more details of its previously announced blockchain ticketing roadmap. The company is executing a two-track rollout of its blockchain ticketing platform which unifies ticketing, payments, identity, and AR/AI navigation
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/nextech3d-ai-announces-two-track-blockchain-ticketing-roadmap/

data.title: Zeus Network CEO: Zeus will enable BNB Chain DeFi protocol to generate Bitcoin income
data.description: At the X Space event co-hosted by Odaily Planet Daily and Zeus Network on the evening of September 23rd, Zeus Network co-founder and CEO Justin discussed his experience with the recent Binance Alpha node launch. He stated that the Binance team maintains a close eye on the Bitcoin ecosystem and, during discussions, recognized the cross-chain approach provided by Zeus—using zBTC to bring native Bitcoin to high-quality public chains like Solana, rather than creating a new independent chain. Justin noted that Binance has observed that most zBTC deposits come from retail investors, indicating that ordinary users are actively using this technology to gain access to Bitcoin returns. He believes that if Zeus's infrastructure layer is deployed on BNB Chain, it will have the potential to bring real Bitcoin returns to more DeFi or CeDeFi protocols, attracting more BNB users.

data.title: Zeus Network CEO: The core of the Solana and BNB Chain deployment is to build Bitcoin applications with millions of users
data.description: On the evening of September 23rd, at the X Space event co-hosted by Odaily Planet Daily and Zeus Network, Justin, co-founder and CEO of Zeus Network, shared his views on Bitcoin DeFi and the multi-chain landscape. He stated that the team has been continuously building on Solana since participating in the 2020 Global Hackathon, prioritizing the resilience and continued contributions of its developer community over simple technical indicators. The team is committed to creating applications that can attract millions of real users, bringing Bitcoin, a "dormant" trillion-dollar asset, to life within efficient ecosystems like Solana and BNB Chain. Regarding Ethereum, he believes that mainnet activity is declining. His discussion of BNB Chain is related to changes in the US legal landscape, the return of CZ, and the significant advantages of exchange traffic. Justin emphasized that in the future, the industry may only need two or three mainstream public chains, with Ethereum, Solana, and BNB Chain coexisting to drive innovation. The focus of competition in the next industry cycle will no longer be on TVL, but on user volume and project revenue.

data.title: An address transferred 77,243 LINK to Binance, worth $1.68 million
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, an address transferred 77,243 LINK tokens to Binance three minutes ago, worth US$1.68 million. In the past three weeks, the address has transferred a total of 196,402 LINK to Binance, worth US$4.46 million.

data.title: CZ confirms $200K frozen on HTX after SFUND bridge exploit
data.description:
This week, attackers took advantage of the SFUND bridge in Seedify, which resulted in losses of approximately $1. 7 million across different chains. Binance founder Changpeng Zhao confirmed that $200,000 of the money involved in the attack had been frozen on HTX. Meta Alchemist, the project’s partner, said the attackers drained funds through its OFT bridge […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cz-confirms-200k-frozen-at-htx-after-sfund/

data.title: Bitget has launched U-standard FLUID and BLESS perpetual contracts
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched U-margined FLUID and BLESS perpetual contracts, with maximum leverage of 75x and 50x, respectively. Contract trading on BOT will also be available simultaneously.

data.title: Solana's Tokenized Real-World Assets Reach Record High
data.description: According to PANews, the total value of tokenized real-world assets (RWA) on the Solana blockchain has surged to a record $671 million. This milestone follows an influx of over $150 million into BlackRock's BUIDL fund on the Solana network.

data.title: SOL Treasury DeFi Development's board approves $100 million share buyback
data.description: Solana treasury company DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) announced that its board of directors has approved an expansion of the company's existing share repurchase program, increasing the authorized amount from $1 million to up to $100 million of the company's common stock. The timing, method, and amount of repurchases will be determined by management based on a comprehensive assessment of market conditions and other factors. (Globenewswire)

data.title: China to drop claim to WTO developing countries’ benefits
data.description:
China has announced it will no longer claim benefits reserved for developing countries in World Trade Organization (WTO) negotiations. The concession comes years after Washington started probing the country for acquiring “undeserved trade benefits. ” Premier Li Qiang revealed the move at the United Nations General Assembly in New York on Tuesday, where he said Beijing […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-to-drop-wto-developing-countries-claim/

data.title: U.S. Court Rules in Favor of Bloomberg in Crypto Disclosure Case
data.description:
According to PANews, on September 22, a U.S. federal judge in Delaware ruled in favor of Bloomberg in a lawsuit filed by Justin Sun, seeking to prevent the publication of his cryptocurrency holdings. Sun had submitted a motion for a temporary restraining order to stop Bloomberg from disclosing specific details about his assets. Judge Colm Connolly determined that Sun failed to provide clear and convincing evidence that Bloomberg had agreed not to disclose his asset details.

Court documents revealed that Sun holds 60 billion TRX, 17,000 BTC, 224,000 ETH, and 700 million USDT. In February, Bloomberg contacted Sun's team for its Billionaires Index, leading to Sun initially filing and then withdrawing a lawsuit after the article's publication. Following unsuccessful negotiations, Sun filed another motion on September 11, requesting Bloomberg to remove the related content. Sun claimed that a reporter had promised confidentiality, which Bloomberg denied.

The judge also noted that Sun did not demonstrate that the disclosure of information would make him more vulnerable, and that Sun himself had disclosed more specific Bitcoin information.

data.title: Bloomberg analysts: ETFs have additional advantages over crypto tokens, including regulatory protection
data.description: Eric Balchunas, senior ETF analyst at Bloomberg, wrote on the X platform that ETFs offer all the advantages of crypto tokens: instant access, extremely low costs, flexibility, and returns (ETFs can be fully lent). Furthermore, ETFs offer additional advantages that crypto tokens lack: significant regulatory protection and anonymity.

data.title: Chainlink Selected by Canton Network as Super Validator for Oracle Integration and CCIP
data.description: Chainlink has integrated with the institutional-grade Canton Network, aiming to significantly promote the widespread adoption of blockchain technology within the institutional sector. This partnership brings Chainlink's data services, such as data streaming, smart data (including Proof of Reserve and NAVLink), and the Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP), to the Canton Network. Furthermore, the Canton Network has joined the Chainlink Scale program, which helps cover the operating costs of its oracle. Under the agreement, Chainlink Labs will become a "super validator" for the Canton Network. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Solana Treasury Firm Secures $25 Million in Private Funding
data.description: According to PANews, Solana Treasury firm SOL Strategies, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker FTEL, has announced a $25 million private placement financing. This funding was conducted in accordance with the Canadian Securities Administrators' exemption requirements for listed issuer financing. The company raised the funds through the sale of common shares and share purchase warrants. Canaccord Genuity Corp. acted as the lead agent and exclusive bookrunner for the transaction. The proceeds from this financing will be allocated towards general corporate purposes and digital asset investments, aiming to drive the growth of SOL Treasury.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson: It's unclear whether the U.S. government will shut down next week
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson said it is unclear whether the U.S. government will shut down next week. (Jinshi)

data.title: Nasdaq-listed Iveda announces the creation of a cryptocurrency treasury
data.description: Iveda, a Nasdaq-listed provider of cloud-based video AI search and monitoring technology solutions, announced the establishment of a cryptocurrency treasury strategy. Its board of directors has authorized the purchase of cryptocurrencies to achieve asset diversification, but the company has not yet disclosed the specific cryptocurrencies it intends to purchase. (Businesswire)

data.title: The EU wants to restart tariff discussions with US on aluminum and steel
data.description:
The European Union announced Wednesday it plans to revive discussions with the United States over reducing fees on steel and aluminum shipments, as multiple nations work to resolve ongoing trade tensions. EU trade commissioner Maros Sefcovic will sit down with US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer during the coming days to discuss removing or cutting back […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/eu-restart-tariff-discussions-steel-usa/

data.title: US Treasury Secretary Benson: We need to at least return to a neutral interest rate
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson said we need to lower interest rates, at least to return to a neutral rate, and he also said he would wait and see how the AI ​​craze develops. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson: Powell should signal a 100-150 basis point rate cut
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson said he was surprised that Federal Reserve Chairman Powell had not yet hinted at an interest rate target. The revisions to the employment data suggest something is amiss. He added that with several Fed interviews scheduled next week, Powell should signal a 100-150 basis point rate cut.
